description: Style NoteThe perfect blend of beauty and style, this handmade necklace from adrika adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look.Product DetailsChunky neck-piece, blue ceramic beads threaded with wooden beads, metal claspMaterial and CareCeramic and wooden beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 50 cm
